Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Or Limit Multiple Deposition Subpoenas For Employment And Medical Records
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF FUAD MAKHUMDOV's Motion To Quash Or Limit Multiple Deposition Subpoenas For Employment And Medical Records is granted as the motion seeks to quash the subpoenas as they are overly broad. Counsel must meet and confer to limit the subpoenas. All requests for sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
